name: Trickstar Nightshade
name_jp: トリックスター・ヒヨス
desc: If this card is sent to the GY as Link Material for the Link Summon of a "Trickstar" monster: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Trickstar Nightshade" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is sent to the GY as Link Material for the Link Summon of a "Trickstar" monster: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Trickstar Nightshade" once per turn.
eff: If this card is sent to the GY as Link Material for the Link Summon of a "Trickstar" monster: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Trickstar Nightshade" once per turn.

action: Activates if used as Link Material
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
